# viettelidc_vdbs_backup_scheduler (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Backup scheduler ID

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Creation time (ISO 8601)
- `current_record` (Number) Current number of backup records
- `description` (String) Scheduler description
- `fixed_rate` (Number) Fixed rate
- `location` (String) Backup location (block, object)
- `max_record` (Number) Maximum number of backup records to keep
- `name` (String) Scheduler name
- `next_scheduler_run_time` (String) Next scheduler run time (ISO 8601)
- `number_of_instance` (Number) Number of instances in this scheduler
- `prev_scheduler_run_status` (String) Previous scheduler run status
- `prev_scheduler_run_time` (String) Previous scheduler run time
- `scheduler_type` (String) Scheduler type (daily, weekly, monthly, etc)
- `status` (String) Scheduler status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, etc)
- `update_time` (String) Last update time (ISO 8601)
- `vpc_id` (Number) VPC ID
